ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "fr_size" INTEGER /* Size in France (FR) */,
  "it_size" INTEGER /* Size in Italy (IT) */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* Size in the United States (US) */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* Size in the United Kingdom (UK) */,
  "jp_size" INTEGER /* Size in Japan (JP) */,
  "cn_size" TEXT /* Size in China (CN) */,
  "jeans_size" TEXT /* Size for Jeans (e.g., 23, 24-25) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is applicable (e.g., Men, Women) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "size_chart_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the size chart image for the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_jp_size FOREIGN KEY ("jp_size") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_it_size FOREIGN KEY ("it_size") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_us_size FOREIGN KEY ("us_size") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_fr_size FOREIGN KEY ("fr_size") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_cn_size FOREIGN KEY ("cn_size") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_uk_size FOREIGN KEY ("uk_size") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (e.g., FR, IT, US) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., Jeans) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit for the product */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "preferred_country" INTEGER /* ID of the user's preferred country */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's preferred size */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_preferred_country FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred size */,
  "last_visited" TEXT /* Date of the last visit to the category */,
  "size_fitting" TEXT /* Preferred fit (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  "color_preferences" TEXT /* Preferred colors (e.g., blue, black, gray) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, purchase) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "conversion_from" TEXT /* Size conversion from (e.g., FR 32) */,
  "conversion_to" TEXT /* Size conversion to (e.g., US 00) */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date of the size conversion */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., size, category) */,
  "conversion_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the conversion process */,
  "conversion_source" TEXT /* Source of the conversion (e.g., website, app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
